news.t: How To Avoid The Worst Sector ETFs 3Q23
Materials ETFs surge as investors shop for deep discounts

holdings.infoBox: PSCM is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Element Solutions stock at 12.19%, Eastman Chemical Company at 10.45%, Celanese at 7.07%, Balchem at 6.69%, and Materion at 6.63%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Materials ETF (PSCM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 / Materials index. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap basic materials firms weighted by market cap. PSCM was launched on Apr 7, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: How To Avoid The Worst Sector ETFs 3Q23
data.text: I leverage my firm's data to identify three red flags you can use to avoid the worst ETFs.

data.title: Materials ETFs surge as investors shop for deep discounts
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with a big position in Arconic Corporation ARNC jumped sharply in midday trade Monday.
